daily.today_energy: The cosmos is giving you permission to take up space today. Your vibe is magnetic—people are drawn to your authenticity. Trust what your gut's been whispering lately; it knows something your brain hasn't caught up to yet.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, someone's energy is shifting around you in a way that feels significant. Don't overthink it. Sometimes the best connections happen when you stop trying to balance the scales and just... exist together.
daily.career: Your creative instincts are sharper than usual. That idea you've been sitting on? It's time. The universe is backing your bold moves today—step into your power without asking for permission first.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and sunlight. Even a short walk hits different today. You're radiating calm, peaceful energy—lean into that and let it restore you from the inside out.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Libra, and honestly? The energy feels like a reset button. You're shedding old patterns and stepping into something fresher. Trust your instincts—they're sharper than usual.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is about real conversations. The vibe is less surface-level small talk, more authentic connection. If something's been unsaid, the cosmos is giving you permission to speak it.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is *chef's kiss* right now. This is the week to pitch ideas or start that project you've been procrastinating on. You're not just thinking differently—you're thinking bigger.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and stillness in equal measure. Think yoga meets dancing, or whatever gets you grounded yet energized. Listen to what feels good instead of forcing routines that don't serve you.
